sql_array: CREATE TABLE programming_code (id UInt32, source_code String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT detectProgrammingLanguage(source_code) AS language FROM programming_code WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE programming_code SET source_code = 'def hello_world(): print("Hello, World!")' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT detectProgrammingLanguage(source_code) AS language FROM programming_code WHERE source_code LIKE 'def%';
